mapper.select: SELECT batch_no, product_name, product_category, amount, unit, supplier_name, warehouse, purchase_date, check_result, shelf_life FROM t_raw_batch WHERE batch_no = #{batchNo} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT batch_no, product_name, product_category, amount, unit, supplier_name, warehouse, purchase_date, check_result, shelf_life FROM t_raw_batch WHERE product_name = #{productName} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY purchase_date DESC
